tools.name: survey_environment
tools.description: Run scripts/survey_environment.sh to detect runtime environment and generate ENV_PROFILE.json

tools.name: generate_env_profile
tools.description: Instantiate config/ENV_PROFILE.json from ENV_PROFILE.template.json with detected values

tools.name: run_entrypoint
tools.description: Execute scripts/entrypoint.sh to begin bootstrap based on ENV_PROFILE bootstrap.mode

tools.name: run_minimal_loop
tools.description: Execute scripts/bootstrap_minimal_loop.sh to verify infrastructure completeness

tools.name: verify_template_version
tools.description: Read config/template_version.json to confirm template compatibility

notes: All tools map to actual scripts in scripts/ directory
No placeholder tools in this skill
